entry.title: Git 2.55 Ships Smarter Repacking That Makes Huge Repos 2x Faster
entry.summary: Git 2.55 ships incremental MIDX repacking, a new git history fixup command, Linux fsmonitor support, and a raft of performance improvements

entry.title: Replit Desktop Escapes the Browser Tab on Mac and Windows
entry.summary: Replit launches a native desktop app for Mac and Windows, bringing distraction-free AI-powered development outside the browser

entry.title: Google AI Studio Ships Chat History Sharing for Vibe-Coded Apps
entry.summary: Google AI Studio's Build mode now lets you bundle your full chat history when sharing an app, making prompt workflows instantly reproducible for anyone with the link.

entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 Hits General Availability Inside Microsoft Foundry
entry.summary: Claude Opus 4.8 and Haiku 4.5 graduate from preview to GA in Microsoft Foundry, unlocking Azure-native billing, MACC drawdown, and a new 'hosted on Azure' mode with US data residency

entry.title: Cursor Launches iOS App Turning Your Phone Into an AI Agent Command Center
entry.summary: Cursor launches a native iOS app that lets developers spawn and supervise AI coding agents from anywhere, as the company prepares to close its $60B SpaceX acquisition

entry.title: Cognition's Devin Fusion Cuts Coding AI Costs 35% Without Losing Frontier Intelligence
entry.summary: Cognition's Devin Fusion uses a parallel 'sidekick' agent and dynamic mid-session routing to cut frontier-model costs by 35% without sacrificing code quality.

entry.title: Meta's Brain2Qwerty v2 Decodes Thoughts Into Text Without Brain Surgery
entry.summary: Meta's Brain2Qwerty v2 decodes full sentences from brain waves without surgery, hitting 61% word accuracy and releasing all training code publicly

entry.title: vLLM-Omni Squeezes 172% More Audio Out of Four Speech Models
entry.summary: vLLM-Omni squeezes up to 172% more audio throughput from four TTS models by treating each pipeline stage as a separate optimization problem

entry.title: GitHub Copilot Matches Claude Code While Burning Fewer Tokens
entry.summary: GitHub benchmarks its own agentic harness against Claude Code and Codex CLI, showing token efficiency gains without sacrificing task resolution across 20+ models.

entry.title: Baidu's Unlimited-OCR Parses 200-Page PDFs With Flat Memory Usage
entry.summary: Baidu's Unlimited-OCR brings constant-memory long-document parsing to vLLM, transcribing 40+ pages in a single pass with a new attention mechanism that never grows the KV cache

entry.title: OpenAI's Codex Desktop App Gets Smoother Navigation for Long AI Threads
entry.summary: OpenAI ships a batch of Codex app polish: smoother long-thread scrolling, a new navigation rail, better Settings search, and zoom-level UI fixes.

entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos 5 Returns After US Government Lifts Infrastructure Ban
entry.summary: After a 15-day government-ordered freeze over jailbreak fears, Anthropic's most powerful cybersecurity AI is back online for critical infrastructure defenders
